# `hospitality` — hospitality templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry (business travelers)  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating hotel and travel booking services

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Hotel Reservation Confirmation | [`hotel_reservation_confirm.html`](hotel_reservation_confirm.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Marriott Bonvoy – Points Expiring | [`marriott_bonvoy_points.html`](marriott_bonvoy_points.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 30-50% |

## Template details

### Hotel Reservation Confirmation

- **File:** [`hotel_reservation_confirm.html`](hotel_reservation_confirm.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hospitality_education.html`](education/hospitality_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your reservation confirmation — action required
  - Hotel booking: Payment verification needed
  - Upcoming stay: Credit card on file needs updating
- **Operator notes:** Best for frequent business travelers. Timed near known travel periods for maximum effectiveness.

### Marriott Bonvoy – Points Expiring

- **File:** [`marriott_bonvoy_points.html`](marriott_bonvoy_points.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hospitality_education.html`](education/hospitality_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your Marriott Bonvoy points expire in 7 days
  - Action needed: 12,500 Bonvoy points about to expire
  - Don't lose your Marriott Bonvoy rewards
- **Operator notes:** Loyalty-expiry lure. Pairs well with the existing hotel reservation template for a hospitality-sector campaign.

### Booking.com – Reservation Payment Hold

- **File:** [`booking_reservation_hold.html`](booking_reservation_hold.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hospitality_education.html`](education/hospitality_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action required: your reservation is on hold
  - Confirm payment to secure your Booking.com reservation
  - Your upcoming stay could be cancelled
- **Operator notes:** Payment-hold urgency is highly credible for anyone with travel booked. Avoids implausible technical claims.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
